payload.summary: Implemented reversible DB-gated readiness so `HealthService.readiness()` returns false when the process is not running, when `database.isAvailable()` is false, or when that check throws, while leaving other probe signatures intact.
scopeNotes: No production or test files were modified beyond `src/health-service.ts`; `test/health-service.test.ts` already contains readiness coverage for DB unavailable/available and DB error cases.
All existing public API signatures in `HealthService` and `DatabaseHealth` remain unchanged.
residualRisks: Readiness now depends on DB probe latency and failure mode, so transient DB outages can temporarily reduce routable capacity.
